_comment: Repeatable fixture for POST /broll-picker. Synthetic data — no real client, no PII. Adjust the model field for diagnostic testing.

transcript.text: Most VAs treat tasks like a checklist.
But the great ones think two steps ahead.
When I onboard a new operator, I look for one specific habit.
Do they ask why before they ask how?
Because that one question changes everything about the work they ship.
Last week, my team caught a billing error worth six thousand dollars.
Not because I told them to look — because they understood why it mattered.

library.insight: shows the tactical execution work — going through tasks one at a time
library.when_to_use: talking about VA workflows / task lists / checklists / execution
